sourcesContent:
import { useParams } from "react-router-dom";
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import "./styles/Books.css";

    { title:"Unshakeable", author:"Tony Robbins", cover:"https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/isbn/9781501164583-L.jpg" }
  ]
};


function CategoryBooks() {
  const { name } = useParams();
  const [books, setBooks] = useState([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const allBooks =
      JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("allBooks")) || [];

    const filtered = allBooks.filter(
      (book) => book.category === name
    );

    setBooks(filtered);
  }, [name]);

  return (
    <div className="books-page">
      <h1 className="books-title">{name} Books</h1>

      <div className="books-grid">
        {books.length === 0 ? (
          <p>No books in this genre yet.</p>
        ) : (
          books.map((book, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="book-card">
              <img src={book.cover} alt={book.title} />
              <h3>{book.title}</h3>
              <p>{book.author}</p>
            </div>
          ))
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export default CategoryBooks;
